name: Brilliant Class
overview: Former pop star Xiang Dongnan becomes a high school music teacher through a reality show and clashes with strict English teacher Su Qi, sparking a battle of wills as they navigate school life, mysterious leadership, and a classroom full of spirited students.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: A Star Become A Teacher | Brilliant Class 8 | 原来是老师啊 | iQiyi
